subject: Status review: labrador milestone in Auckland | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-7761
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-7761. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: handoff, readiness.
